name: Email
description: Send transactional emails via Cloudflare Email Service. Subscribes to auth lifecycle events (welcome, password reset, password changed) and runs a 5-minute reconciliation cron against the CF GraphQL Activity Log.
author: SonicJS Team

provider.label: Email Provider
provider.description: Select your email transport. Env var RESEND_API_KEY forces Resend; EMAIL CF binding enables Cloudflare Email Service.

resendApiKey.label: Resend API Key
resendApiKey.description: Required when provider is Resend. Overridden by RESEND_API_KEY env var.

fromEmail.label: From Email
fromEmail.description: Sender address. Must be verified with your provider.

logoUrl.label: Logo URL
logoUrl.description: Logo to display in email templates

cfAccountId.label: CF Account ID
cfAccountId.description: Reconciliation cron credential. Overridden by CF_ACCOUNT_ID env var.

cfEmailApiToken.label: CF Email API Token
cfEmailApiToken.description: API token with Email Routing read permission. Overridden by EMAIL_API_TOKEN env var.
